历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest science ranking was approximately 18,307; in 2023, approximately 46,179; in 2024, approximately 26,883 for regular science (43,810 for Radio and Television Directing); in 2025, approximately 32,274 for Physics Category. Rankings have fluctuated significantly in recent years, with a 2025 baseline of about 32,274. Science enrollment plans: 78 in 2022, 69 in 2023, 62 in 2024, 57 in 2025 for Physics Category; 61 in 2026 for Physics Category, an increase of about 7% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 48th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science Rankings, with stable rankings in the 44-53 range in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, with high enthusiasm for master's degree applications. Douyin popularity total ranking is 67th (average), with no record of filing gaps, and overall public opinion is stable. Disciplines: Statistics A, Ecology A-, Biology A-, directly related to enrollment majors in Physics Category such as Mathematics (Statistics) and Biological Sciences (Biology), attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended; teacher training/education majors are divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is approximately 535,000, with an estimated 329,000 in the Physics Category based on the 2025 ratio, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 285,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin, and recruits across provinces. Sichuan is an important source province for the university, with 109 students enrolled in 2022, 98 in 2023, and about 85 in 2025, showing a slight decline in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as significant fluctuations in historical rankings, a small 7% expansion in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, an increase of about 15.6% in local examinees intensifying competition, a generally positive reputation, and high social popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, the effect of increased examinees outweighs the expansion effect, leading to intensified competition and a forward shift in ranking compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 33,433, with a range of 32,933 to 33,933.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 32,933 to 33,933, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 experimental classes and flagship teacher training majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<32,933), prioritize experimental classes in Mathematics, Physics, Biology, and Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>33,933), mainly choose Tier 3 majors, prioritizing the platform advantages of Northeast Normal University.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 3234; in 2023, approximately 3670; in 2024, approximately 4939 for regular liberal arts (8512 for Radio and Television Directing); in 2025, approximately 4765 for history category. Rankings have generally shifted backward in recent years, with a baseline of about 4765 in 2025. In 2022, the liberal arts enrollment plan was 31; in 2023, 29; in 2024, 28; in 2025, 28 for history category. In 2026, the history category enrollment plan is 39, an increase of about 39% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 48th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable range of 44-53 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, mainly due to the high popularity of its master's programs and strong interest in the field of education. Its Douyin popularity ranks 67th overall (average), but reached a high of 13th in 2024. No record of admission gaps. It has 6 A- or above disciplines: World History A+, Education A+, Marxist Theory A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, Biology A-, with outstanding strength in normal (teacher education) disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors is mixed with a wait-and-see attitude; publicly-funded normal students have stable employment but intense competition. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 535,000, with an estimated 206,000 in the history category based on the 2025 proportion, an increase of about 15.7% from 178,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin, and recruits across provinces. In 2022, it enrolled 109 students in Sichuan (7.2% of its national total), in 2023, 98 (6.7%), and in 2025, about 85, making Sichuan one of its important source provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the historical trend of ranking decline, the significant 39% expansion in history category enrollment in 2026 easing competition, the 15.7% increase in local examinees intensifying competition, and the positive reputation attracting applicants, the expansion effect outweighs the examinee increase effect. It is expected that the ranking will shift backward compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5938, with a range of 5438-6438.
